posts.author: valorem
posts.text: The P/E has fallen a lot due to rise in earnings and fall in price. Is it attractive at the current P/E of ~17?

posts.author: ALTAF_HUSSAIN
posts.text: Management guided for 1300 Cr. PAT for FY2028. If market gives 10 PE Mcap will be 13,000 Cr. If it gets 15 PE then 19,500 Cr. Mcap. by FY28. Current Mcap is only 2940 Cr. Current PE 16.6 Is my understanding correct? Disc. invested

posts.author: onfel
posts.text: Stock is also up 42% over the trailing month for no reason. There is often little rhyme or reason to small cap movements on the short run.

posts.author: pg285
posts.text: Could the current sell-off in Insolation Energy be a delayed contagion effect from Waaree Energies’ recent Q4 earnings, where a ~10% price correction was triggered by a 440-basis-point margin contraction—largely attributed to rising input material costs?

posts.author: ALTAF_HUSSAIN
posts.text: Stock fell 10% in last 2 sessions. Not able to find any news or something
